title: ORAL HULL FOUNDATION FOR THE BLIND - 211info
text: HULL FOUNDATION AND LEARNING CENTER ORAL HULL FOUNDATION FOR THE BLIND Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers low vision equipment, classes, workshops, and activities including retreats and overnight getaways. Also provides care team training for those who work with people with vision loss and presentations for caregivers and organizations. 43233 SE Oral Hull Road Sandy, OR 97055 Eligibility: Adults with sight loss and their family members or caregivers Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (503) 668-6195 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 668-6195 Main Phone Main Phone (503) 668-6195 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Some direct service from local Sandy bus line Services: Assistive Technology Equipment Provision Options * Blindness Caregiver Training * Blindness General Recreational Activities/Sports * Blindness Medical Equipment/Assistive Technology Donation Programs * Blindness Workshops/Symposiums * Blindness If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
